Plotting disparity curves

Caleb

2025-04-11

Load the data

library(ape)


sim_discrete <- readRDS( file = "../Data/processed/disparity/aceproject/simdiscrete.Rds")
beck_discrete <- readRDS( file = "../Data/processed/disparity/aceproject/beckdiscrete.Rds")
sim_discrete_anc <- readRDS( file = "../Data/processed/disparity/aceproject/simdiscreteanc.Rds")
beck_discrete_anc <- readRDS( file = "../Data/processed/disparity/aceproject/beckdiscreteanc.Rds")

sim_cont <- readRDS( file = "../Data/processed/disparity/aceproject/simcont.Rds")
sim_cont_anc <- readRDS( file = "../Data/processed/disparity/aceproject/simcontanc.Rds")
beck_cont_ <- readRDS( file = "../Data/processed/disparity/aceproject/beckcont.Rds")
beck_cont_anc <- readRDS( file = "../Data/processed/disparity/aceproject/beckcontanc.Rds")

beck_tree <- read.nexus("../Data/raw/trees/Beck2014.tre")
sim_tree <- read.tree("../Data/processed/trees/simulated.tre")

plot(beck_tree, cex = 0.7)

plot(sim_tree, cex = 0.7)

Simulated tree discrete

Simulated tree continuous
